SEARCH
Package co.edu.unbosque.cliente.service

Class ClienteService

java.lang.Object
co.edu.unbosque.cliente.service.ClienteService
All Implemented Interfaces:
CRUDOperations<Cliente>
@Service public class ClienteService extends Object implements CRUDOperations<Cliente>
Business service for managing Cliente entities. Implements CRUDOperations to provide standard create/read/update/delete behavior along with a few helpers. Spring will detect this class via the Service annotation.
Author:
Wilmer Ramos

      public ClienteService()

  • Method Details

    • crear

      public int crear(Cliente o)
      Persist a new client, verifying that the cedula is not already used.
      Specified by:
      crear in interface CRUDOperations<Cliente>
      Parameters:
      o - client object to persist
      Returns:
      0 on success, 1 if cedula already exists

    • eliminar

      public int eliminar(Long in)
      Delete the client with the given database id.
      Specified by:
      eliminar in interface CRUDOperations<Cliente>
      Parameters:
      in - id of the client to remove
      Returns:
      0 if removed, 1 if not found

    • mostrarTodo

      public List<Cliente> mostrarTodo()
      Retrieve every client in the repository.
      Specified by:
      mostrarTodo in interface CRUDOperations<Cliente>
      Returns:
      list of clients (possibly empty)

    • actualizar

      public int actualizar(Long id, Cliente nuevaData)
      Update an existing client after performing validation checks.
      Specified by:
      actualizar in interface CRUDOperations<Cliente>
      Parameters:
      id - id of the client to update
      nuevaData - new values for the client
      Returns:
      0 on success, 1 if cedula conflict, 2 if id not found

    • buscarPorId

      public Optional<Cliente> buscarPorId(Long id)
      Find a client by its database identifier.
      Specified by:
      buscarPorId in interface CRUDOperations<Cliente>
      Parameters:
      id - id to look up
      Returns:
      optional containing the client if found

    • buscarPorCedula

      public Cliente buscarPorCedula(Long cedula)
      Look up a client using the cedula field.
      Parameters:
      cedula - identification number
      Returns:
      matching client (assumes existence)

    • findTitleAlreadyTaken

      public boolean findTitleAlreadyTaken(Cliente newCliente)
      Helper to determine whether the cedula of a new client is already used.
      Parameters:
      newCliente - candidate client object
      Returns:
      true if cedula already exists, false otherwise
